{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 加津良神社
| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 加津良神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsurano Shrine'''|加津良神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].
